Accordion

Accordion Component

This page documents the USWDS Accordion component.

  • Accordions allow content to expand/collapse.
  • Variants include bordered, stacked, and default.
  • Can support multi-select behavior.

Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion,
or prohibiting the free exercise thereof; or abridging the freedom of speech,
or of the press; or the right of the people peaceably to assemble.

A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State,
the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.

No Soldier shall, in time of peace, be quartered in any house,
without the consent of the Owner.

Component HTML




  
    

      
    

    

      Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion,
or prohibiting the free exercise thereof; or abridging the freedom of speech,
or of the press; or the right of the people peaceably to assemble.

    

  
    

      
    

    

      A well regulated Militia, being necessary to the security of a free State,
the right of the people to keep and bear Arms, shall not be infringed.

    

  
    

      
    

    

      No Soldier shall, in time of peace, be quartered in any house,
without the consent of the Owner.

Example front matter

.\src\pages\components\accordion.md
